chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1166 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.6878/2025 (C/A) 28-10-2025 Petitioner, namely Hadi Bux Maitlo present in person Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant PG for the State Inspector Gul Muhammad Mahar, SHO PS B-Section, Khairpur, SIP Ghulam Asghar on behalf of SSP, Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< Statements along with certain documents have been filed by Respondents No.2, 3, 4 and 5, which are taken on record, copies whereof are provided to the petitioner, who is present in person. On perusal of the order dated 28-03-2023, it reflects the instant Constitutional Petition was dismissed and for other grievances, the Petitioner was directed to file an application before the SSP or DIG concerned. In the circumstances, no case is made out for initiating contempt proceedings. Accordingly, the listed Contempt Application is dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
